creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191633
Patch updating databases/pgsanity to v2.9.0

The upstream maintainer was kind enough to tag a release on GitHub so that we can simplify our Makefile.

There are no functional changes comparing to the current pgsanity version we've got in ports.

QA:
 - portlint
 - poudriere: 11.1 amd64
